title: Your 401k Default Setting Is Quietly Stealing $342K
hook: Your employer auto-enrolled you at 3% — and 68% of workers never change it. Here's what that silent setting is actually costing you.
angle: Most people trust HR picked the right default. It was chosen to minimize admin cost, not fund your retirement — and status quo bias locks you in forever.
audience: Workers with 401k access who haven't reviewed their contribution rate in years
key_numbers: 68% of auto-enrolled workers never change their default contribution rate
$342,000 difference between contributing 3% vs 15% over 30 years
